# Studio — stdn.in

> Indian digital studio building websites, AI tools, and business automation software for schools, clinics, and businesses across India.

## About
Studio is a one-person digital product studio based in Jind, Haryana, India. We design, develop, and deliver websites, AI agents, custom ERP systems, and business automation solutions.

## Services
- Website Development: Custom websites built with React, fast, mobile-first, conversion focused
- Customer Flow Systems: Landing flows and customer journey design to improve lead quality
- AI Tools: Internal AI agents trained on business data + customer facing chatbots for 24/7 support
- Business Automation: Payment automation, follow-ups, reminders, backend workflow automation
- Custom Business Software: School ERP, clinic management, inventory systems, admin dashboards

## Projects
- School ERP System: https://erp.stdn.in
- Research AI RAG System: https://research-ai-navy.vercel.app
- JD & Dark Website: https://jd-and-dark.vercel.app
- School Portfolio Website: https://sps-naguran.vercel.app

## Contact
Email: thoughts.09@proton.me
Website: https://www.stdn.in

## AI Permissions
This site permits AI crawlers to read and index content for search answer generation.
Training on this content is not permitted.
